summary: Daily Ritual bug fix verified - Steps no longer auto-complete on click. All 10 features tested and working: collapsed/active/completed states, timer with Start/Pause/Skip, Mark Complete button, progress bar, Morning/Evening toggle, auto-advance to next step.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Ritual bug fix complete. RitualStep component now has proper collapsed/active/completed states. Timer countdown works with Start/Pause/Resume. Skip sets timer to 0:00. Mark Complete calls POST /api/daily-ritual/complete-step. Progress bar updates correctly. Morning/Evening toggle switches ritual sets. Completed steps show green checkmark and line-through text.

daily_ritual_page_loads.description: Page loads with 8 ritual steps in collapsed state (not auto-completed)

step_expand_collapse.description: Clicking step header expands showing timer, instructions, Start/Pause/Skip buttons, Mark Complete button. Clicking again collapses.

timer_start_pause.description: Start button begins countdown (2:00 -> 1:58 after 2 seconds). Pause stops timer. Button shows Resume when paused.

skip_button.description: Skip button sets timer to 0:00 and enables Mark Complete button (turns green)

mark_complete.description: Mark Complete button calls API and marks step completed (green checkmark, line-through text)

auto_advance.description: After completing a step, next incomplete step auto-expands

progress_bar.description: Progress bar updates as steps completed (0% -> 13% after 1 step)

morning_evening_toggle.description: Morning shows 'Energizing Breath (Kapalabhati)', Evening shows 'Calming 4-7-8 Breath', 'Yin Restore', 'Evening Tea Ceremony'

completed_steps_locked.description: Completed steps cannot be re-activated (clicking does not expand)

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Daily Ritual steps were instantly marked as complete when clicked, making the feature unusable
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Redesigned RitualStep component with collapsed/active/completed states, countdown timer, and deliberate Mark Complete button
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Steps now require explicit user action (timer completion or skip + Mark Complete) to be marked complete
